title: Building safe Payment Infrastructure for the autonomous economy — Steve Kaliski, Stripe
summary: Steve Kaliski from Stripe presents infrastructure for enabling AI agents to execute real financial transactions safely. The talk covers secure credential transmission, business discoverability to agents, and guardrails to prevent catastrophic autonomous spending risks.
